title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm in town with Daiwa Scarlet...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: That claw machine! It's full of plush Cuties!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet points toward a claw machine filled
with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Aren't they just adorable? Look, there are so
many!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I want to collect them all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet practically sparkles with excitement
as she stares at the plushies.
choice_data_list: Do you want me to win you one?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I... I was just looking, is all. It's not like I actually
want one or anything.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But if you really want to give me a present, then I guess I can humor you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: So, uh, do your best, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
